entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: Loss of soil, nutrients, and organic carbon that presents a major threat to agriculture

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The sector threatened by soil erosion

entities.name: SOIL EROSION MODELLING
entities.description: Process used to plan suitable soil protection measures and detect erosion hotspots

entities.name: BIBLIOMETRIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to reveal research patterns and characteristics of soil erosion modelling

entities.name: COLLABORATION NETWORKS
entities.description: Networks investigated as part of the bibliometric analysis

entities.name: CITATION PATTERNS
entities.description: Patterns investigated as part of the bibliometric analysis

entities.name: GASEMT DATABASE
entities.description: Global Applications of Soil Erosion Modelling Tracker database containing citation characteristics and publication type

entities.name: GENERALIZED BOOSTED REGRESSION TREE
entities.description: Modelling technique used to evaluate the most relevant variables related to soil erosion modelling

entities.name: BIBLIOMETRIC NETWORKS
entities.description: Networks analyzed and visualized in the study

entities.name: SOIL EROSION MODEL
entities.description: The specific model selected, which has the largest impact on the number of publication citations

entities.name: MODELLING SCALE
entities.description: A variable impacting the number of publication citations

entities.name: CITESCORE
entities.description: A metric impacting the number of publication citations

entities.name: MODEL CALIBRATION
entities.description: Process of adjusting a model, which can increase citations but had negligible influence according to the BRT model

entities.name: VALIDATION
entities.description: Process of verifying a model, which had negligible influence on citations according to the BRT model

entities.name: BIBLIOGRAPHIC COUPLING
entities.description: A method showing a clear continental pattern in research

entities.name: CITATION NETWORKS
entities.description: Networks showing a clear continental pattern in research

entities.name: CO-AUTHORSHIP NETWORK
entities.description: Network that does not show the same continental characteristics as citation networks

entities.name: FIELD MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Data collection used for evaluating soil erosion models

entities.name: PERFORMANCE ASSESSMENT
entities.description: Process of evaluating the accuracy of soil erosion models

entities.name: UNCERTAINTY OF MODELLING RESULTS
entities.description: A factor to be considered when evaluating soil erosion models
